summary: Iteration 159 - Warehouse Pickup Traceability & DDT PDF Download Fix Verified. All 6 backend tests passed for the preleva-da-magazzino endpoint. Frontend code review confirms downloadPdfBlob replaces window.open in DDTEditorPage.js.
test_credentials: Test sessions created and cleaned up dynamically during tests
seed_data_creation: Test data (user, session, commessa, articoli with/without certificate metadata) created via mongosh fixtures - all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 159 verified two features: (1) POST /api/commesse/{cid}/preleva-da-magazzino now creates material_batch and lotto_cam records when the articolo has numero_colata or heat_number metadata - this enables EN 1090 traceability for materials from warehouse stock. (2) DDTEditorPage.js correctly imports downloadPdfBlob from utils.js and uses it in handleDownloadPdf function (line 201-204) instead of window.open - this fixes PDF download in iframe sandbox.

tests.name: test_preleva_with_certificate_creates_traceability
tests.description: When picking stock with numero_colata/heat_number, material_batch and lotto_cam records are created

tests.name: test_preleva_without_certificate_no_traceability
tests.description: When picking stock WITHOUT certificate metadata, NO traceability records are created (backward compat)

tests.name: test_preleva_decrements_stock_correctly
tests.description: Stock quantity (giacenza) is correctly decremented after prelievo

tests.name: test_preleva_adds_cost_entry_to_commessa
tests.description: Cost entry is added to commessa.costi_reali with correct importo, tipo, quantita

tests.name: test_preleva_insufficient_stock_returns_error
tests.description: Returns 400 error when trying to pick more than available stock

tests.name: test_preleva_nonexistent_article_returns_404
tests.description: Returns 404 when trying to pick nonexistent article

details.function_usage: Lines 201-204: handleDownloadPdf uses downloadPdfBlob instead of window.open
details.no_window_open: Verified: No window.open calls found in DDTEditorPage.js

verified: DDT editor loads with all components
Type selector, client selector, save button present

traceability_logic_summary.trigger_condition: articolo.numero_colata or articolo.heat_number is not empty

lotto_cam_fields.percentuale_riciclato: from articolo or calculated from metodo_produttivo

traceability_logic_summary.upsert_behavior: Uses update_one with upsert=True to avoid duplicates
